title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud unveiled advancements to Looker that integrate Gemini AI grounded in a governed semantic layer for business intelligence. New capabilities include dashboard agents that automate workflows, conversational analytics, and embedded analytics for the AI-first enterprise.
writeup: This video covers new Looker capabilities from Google Cloud that integrate Gemini AI grounded in a governed semantic layer for business intelligence. The semantic layer matters because it keeps AI-generated analytics consistent with defined metrics and governance rather than operating on raw data. Concrete additions include dashboard agents that automate workflows, conversational analytics, and embedded analytics aimed at business users in an AI-first enterprise.
